title: Modded Legendary Tooltips
description: More mod compatibility for your Legendary Tooltips and a better look!
body:
# Note: You can add this Resource Pack to you modpack!

This Resource Packs adds 16 Tooltip borders related to module styles and currently supports up to 80+ mods (counting addon mods)!

**You'll need to tweak the config file to get its full effect! **

You can find the example config in the resource packs.

![image](https://i.imgur.com/S3YNqgx.png)
